He will be married between 26-28 age. Between 31-33, his wife will
have~ very critical time. Thereafter, he will have 3-5 issues. One son mid one
daughter. out of these children will come to limelight. His good days will start
from 41st year onwards. At 44, he will have a house of his own. These good
times will continue upto his 74th year.
He will win fmne and will get some landed property earned by his
father. As the Sun has Venus in the 12th and no planet in the second, the
profit arising out of paternal property will be very meagre.
CHART206
As Jupiter and Saturn have exchanged places, the native will live an in
dependent life.
